title: Finite-data limits of generation-level learned operator selection in multi-objective FJSP with AGVs
description: Executable source code, frozen protocols, benchmark inputs, audited result ledgers, Pareto fronts, evaluation journals, checkpoint evidence, and analysis outputs for a 26,950-run controlled evaluation of generation-level adaptive operator selection, including 2,000 cross-instance PPO pretraining episodes. Manuscript and journal-submission files are intentionally excluded.
